channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ECORECO] Eco Recycling: Q4/FY26 Results Approved; Subsidiary Stake Acquired
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Eco Recycling Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and full financial year ended March 31, 2026, on both standalone and consolidated bases. The results, including Profit & Loss, Assets & Liabilities, and Cash Flow statements, were reviewed by the Audit Committee and audited by M/s DMKH & Co., Chartered Accountants, who issued an unmodified opinion. Additionally, the Board approved the acquisition of the remaining stake in M/s Ecoreco Park Private Ltd, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary of the company.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Results were approved on both standalone and consolidated bases.
  • Company acquired remaining stake in Ecoreco Park Private Ltd.
  • Ecoreco Park Private Ltd is now a wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ECO RECYCLING LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CRAMC] Canara Robeco AMC Q4 PAT ₹414 Mn, FY26 PAT ₹2,038 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Limited announced its audited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, Revenue from Operations stood at ₹1,142 Mn, a 13% YoY and 4% QoQ increase, while Profit After Tax was ₹414 Mn, down 1% YoY and 22% QoQ. For the full year FY26, Revenue from Operations increased by 17% YoY to ₹4,249 Mn, and Profit After Tax grew by 7% YoY to ₹2,038 Mn. The company's Total AUM reached ₹1,066 billion, up 3% YoY, and Quarterly Average AUM (QAAUM) grew 14% YoY to ₹1,175 billion as of March 31, 2026.

  • Q4 FY26 Revenue from Operations grew 13% YoY to ₹1,142 Mn.
  • FY26 Profit After Tax increased 7% YoY to ₹2,038 Mn.
  • Total AUM reached ₹1,066 billion, a 3% YoY increase.
  • Quarterly Average AUM (QAAUM) rose 14% YoY to ₹1,175 billion.
  • Equity-oriented QAAUM grew 13% YoY to ₹1,069 billion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [WEBELSOLAR] Websol Energy Q4 PAT Jumps 158% YoY to ₹125 Cr; FY26 PAT up 96%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Websol Energy System Ltd announced strong financial results for Q4 FY26 and the full year FY26. For Q4 FY26, revenue surged 132.1% year-on-year to ₹401 crore, with PAT jumping 157.9% to ₹125 crore. The EBITDA margin for the quarter stood at 36.4%. For the full fiscal year FY26, the company reported a revenue of ₹1,049 crore, an 82.4% increase from FY25, and a PAT of ₹303 crore, up 95.8% year-on-year. The full-year EBITDA margin was 40.8%. Key business highlights include the initiation of an upgrade for a Mono PERC cell line to Topcon technology, increasing overall cell capacity to 1.35 GW. Cell Line-2 successfully ramped up, maintaining over 90% utilization. The company turned net cash surplus with ₹34 crore net cash and holds a strong order book of ₹1,161 crore as of March 31, 2026. Websol is well-positioned to capitalize on India's solar manufacturing opportunities, driven by supportive government policies and increasing demand.

  • Q4 FY26 revenue grew 132.1% YoY to ₹401 crore; PAT jumped 157.9% to ₹125 crore.
  • FY26 revenue increased 82.4% to ₹1,049 crore; PAT rose 95.8% to ₹303 crore.
  • Company initiated upgrade of Mono PERC cell line to Topcon, increasing cell capacity to 1.35 GW.
  • Websol became net cash surplus with ₹34 crore net cash as of March 31, 2026.
  • Strong order book of ₹1,161 crore maintained as of March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WEBSOL ENERGY SYSTEM LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HMAAGRO] HMA Agro to Divest Wholly Owned Subsidiaries
item.description:
🔥 Trending

HMA Agro Industries Ltd has announced the Board of Directors' approval for the divestment of its entire equity stake in its wholly-owned subsidiaries, FNS Agro Foods Limited and Laal Agro Food Private Limited. The divestment is subject to definitive agreements and customary conditions precedent. FNS Agro Foods Limited's turnover is Nil and net worth is ₹50.71 Million, contributing 0% and 0.64% respectively. The sale is expected to be completed by May 30, 2025. The buyers are part of the promoter/promoter group and related parties. The consideration will be determined based on a valuation report from a registered valuer.

  • HMA Agro to divest its entire stake in FNS Agro Foods Limited and Laal Agro Food Private Limited.
  • FNS Agro Foods Limited has a net worth of ₹50.71 Million, contributing 0.64%.
  • The proposed sale is expected to be completed by May 30, 2025.
  • Buyers are part of the promoter/promoter group and are related parties.
  • Consideration will be based on a valuation report from a registered valuer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HMA Agro Industries Ltd | Category: Divestment

item.title: [JONJUA] Jonjua Overseas Board to Consider EOI for Telephone Cables Insolvency
item.description:
Jonjua Overseas Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 1, 2026. The primary agenda is to consider and approve the submission of an Expression of Interest (EOI) in consortium with Major Harjinder Singh Jonjua Retd. for the insolvency matter of Telephone Cables Limited. Telephone Cables Limited is a BSE-listed joint sector unit, with Punjab State Industrial Development Corporation as one of its promoters. The board will also address any other business with the Chair's permission.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 1, 2026.
  • To consider submitting EOI for Telephone Cables Limited insolvency.
  • EOI to be submitted in consortium with Major Harjinder Singh Jonjua.
  • Telephone Cables Limited is a BSE-listed joint sector unit.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jonjua Overseas Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LOKESHMACH] Lokesh Machines clarifies preferential issue details
item.description:
Lokesh Machines Ltd has issued clarifications regarding its proposed preferential issue of equity shares and warrants. The company amended its explanatory statement, specifying that promoters, promoter group members, directors, and KMPs do not intend to participate in the equity share issue but will subscribe to warrants. However, specific individuals including Mr. Bollineni Kishore Babu, Mr. Mullapudi Srikrisha, Mr. Srinivas Mullapudi, Mr. Mullapudi Ajay Kumar, and Mrs. Naga Satya Swaroopa Rani Mullapudi intend to subscribe to equity shares. The Ultimate Beneficial Owners of Zandra Herbs & Plantations LLP were identified as Mr. Sharvil Ramanbhai Patel and Mr. Pankaj Ramanbhai Patel. The company also confirmed that the valuation report complies with SEBI ICDR Regulations, 2018.

  • Promoters and KMPs will subscribe to warrants, not equity shares, in the preferential issue.
  • Specific promoters, including Mr. Bollineni Kishore Babu, intend to subscribe to equity shares.
  • Ultimate Beneficial Owners of Zandra Herbs & Plantations LLP identified as Sharvil and Pankaj Patel.
  • Valuation report for the preferential issue complies with SEBI ICDR Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LOKESH MACHINES LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [JINDALSTEL] Jindal Steel Board to Meet May 1 for FY26 Results & Final Dividend
item.description:
Jindal Steel Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 1, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the Financial Year 2025-26. Additionally, the Board will also consider recommending the payment of a final dividend on equity shares for FY2025-26, if any. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for designated persons remains closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the results are publicly disclosed.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 1, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Audited Financial Results for FY2025-26.
  • Board will also consider recommending a final dividend for FY2025-26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until results are public.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL STEEL & POWER LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BTML] Bodhi Tree Board to meet May 4 for fund-raising proposal
item.description:
Bodhi Tree Multimedia Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 4, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve a proposal for fund-raising. This could involve a preferential issue, private placement, and/or a rights issue of securities, for cash or other considerations, including the determination of the issue price. Any such fund-raising would be subject to necessary regulatory and shareholder approvals. Additionally, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, in anticipation of the declaration of audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. This closure applies to all connected persons and insiders.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 4, 2026, to consider fund-raising.
  • Proposal includes preferential issue, private placement, and/or rights issue.
  • Fund-raising will require regulatory and shareholder approvals.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, for FY26 results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bodhi Tree Multimedia Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KABRAEXTRU] Kabra Extrusiontechnik CFO Daulat Jain Resigns
item.description:
Kabra Extrusiontechnik Ltd. announced the resignation of Mr. Daulat Jain, its Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP). His resignation is effective from the close of business hours on April 27, 2026. The company stated that Mr. Jain is resigning to pursue another career opportunity, and there are no other material reasons for his departure. Mr. Jain has committed to supporting a smooth handover process during his transition.

  • Kabra Extrusiontechnik's CFO, Mr. Daulat Jain, has resigned.
  • His resignation is effective from April 27, 2026.
  • The reason cited is to pursue another career opportunity.
  • No other material reasons for the CFO's departure were disclosed.
  • Mr. Jain will assist in the handover process for a smooth transition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KABRA EXTRUSIONTECHNIK LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [OLPCL] Olympic Cards requests BSE to rectify corporate information
item.description:
Olympic Cards Ltd has formally requested the BSE to update and rectify several details under its "Corporate Information" section. The company seeks to include the last book-closure period (August 14, 2025, to September 20, 2025) under security details. It also requests the deletion of "MRC & Associates" as statutory auditors and the replacement of "K. Elangovan & M. Keerthana" with "Deenadayalu.R." as secretarial auditor. Additionally, the company highlighted that its "Corporate Actions" filings on BSE are only available up to January 11, 2024, and has requested an update for all subsequent filings.

  • BSE requested to update book-closure dates.
  • Statutory auditor "MRC & Associates" to be removed.
  • Secretarial auditor changed to Deenadayalu.R.
  • Company seeks update on "Corporate Actions" filings post Jan 2024.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OLYMPIC CARDS LTD. | Category: Clarification
